claim_summary:
Shared helpers for the per-product EDA scripts.

All section scripts (00_*.py … 12_*.py) import from this module so they share
data-loading, output paths, and per-product iteration.
raw_excerpt:
"""Shared helpers for the per-product EDA scripts.

All section scripts (00_*.py … 12_*.py) import from this module so they share
data-loading, output paths, and per-product iteration.
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import sys
from pathlib import Path

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

# wire in the autoresearch utils (data_loader, stats, round5_products)

_AUTORES = _HERE.parents[1] / "autoresearch"                             # ROUND_5/autoresearch/
sys.path.insert(0, str(_AUTORES))
